rationale: Review 1 catches the same rfl-after-Homeomorph.ext fragility and additionally flags the identical issue in instFiberMulAction (Subtype.ext rfl at line 89), which Review 2 misses entirely; crucially, Review 2's proposed fix (use fiberHomeomorph_one/fiberHomeomorph_mul) is circular because those lemmas are themselves proved via map_one/map_mul, making Review 2's guidance actively misleading if acted on.
